title: How do you use the AI Assign Person feature
excerpt: Trying this out but can’t find where to list a person’s skills etc. for the AI to work from. Any help would be appreciated. TIA.

posts.author: Joshua07 (Joshua Johnson)
posts.cookedHtml: Trying this out but can’t find where to list a person’s skills etc. for the AI to work from. Any help would be appreciated. TIA.

posts.author: sirah (Sirah E)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Joshua07 Sirah here from Mindflows

Have you looked into this article? There is a section about Assign people with AI https://support.monday.com/hc/en-us/articles/360002281539-The-People-Column

I hope this helps!
